what_worked_well.observation: Comprehensive test coverage with 72 tests across 8 acceptance criteria
what_worked_well.impact: Full TDD coverage ensured all acceptance criteria were verifiable before implementation

what_worked_well.observation: Clean module organization with dedicated graph module separating call and import extraction
what_worked_well.impact: Separation of concerns enabled parallel development of call and import extractors

what_worked_well.observation: Shared utility function (node_text) reduced code duplication between extractors
what_worked_well.impact: Single source of truth for AST text extraction avoided inconsistent behavior

what_worked_well.observation: Parameterized queries used for SQLite edge insertion preventing SQL injection
what_worked_well.impact: Security best practice applied consistently to new database operations

what_worked_well.observation: Phase state tracking enabled workflow resumption after session interruption
what_worked_well.impact: Workflow continued cleanly from Phase 05 without re-running completed phases

areas_for_improvement.issue: No observations captured during resumed workflow execution
areas_for_improvement.root_cause: Workflow resumed from Phase 05 in new session; earlier phases where observations typically occur had already completed

recommendations.title: Update source-tree.md to document src/graph/ module structure
recommendations.description: Add documentation for the new src/graph/ module directory containing calls.rs and imports.rs.
recommendations.implementation_code: Add to src/ section: 'graph/ - Dependency graph extraction'

recommendations.title: Add observation capture guidance for resumed workflows
recommendations.description: Document in the devforgeai-development skill that resumed workflows should capture observations about what enabled successful resumption.

patterns_observed: TDD workflow with 72 tests across 8 AC files provided comprehensive coverage
Phase state JSON enabled clean workflow resumption from Phase 05
Module organization (src/graph/) follows existing codebase patterns (src/parser/, src/index/)
Parameterized SQL queries consistently used for new database operations
Story file DoD section updated with implementation details and commit reference
constraint_analysis: Context files effectively guided implementation: tech-stack.md allowed tree-sitter for AST parsing, anti-patterns.md enforced parameterized queries for SQLite. No constraint violations detected.
